title: Opening for Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Software Engineer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
